system.damage: crushing branches d10+3 (close, reach, forceful), choking vines/roots d10+1 (reach, grabby)

selected: to care for the forest, especially the trees

system.moves:
- Wield the plants around her like a weapon
- Possess a nearby tree (vulnerable to fire, all but impossible to harm with most weapons)
- Purge or bind an unnatural taint
- Grant a secret or a boon to a friend of the forest

As they mature, Brennauwed grow more sedentary, manifesting only via their own tree or possessing other trees within a few miles. A birdwaig has a motherly regard for all natural things in her territory, and will turn the very forest against any that seek to do it harm.
